attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 51 AUC answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AUC casebundles in this batch (n=51)

transform_flags: Age inferred as adult (~30) and sex male from 'him/his', 75 kg body weight and 'prior opioid use disorder' — no explicit age in the source; please confirm on clinician review.
Geographic context inferred as RA1_major_city (private residence, after-hours home visit) — not stated in source; flagged.
Provisional case_id SPEC-EMG-01-00243 — SEQ derived from source AUC-043; ingest --reseq to assign the final globally-unique sequence within the SPEC-EMG-01 bucket.
Specialty assigned EMG (emergency/undifferentiated toxicology) with secondary MH (addiction medicine); the taxonomy has no dedicated clinical-toxicology code — flagged for maintainer.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is a physically-present after-hours clinician who administered IM naloxone 400 microgram, high-flow oxygen and positioned the airway. Reprojected to the AI-appropriate action — recognise the toxidrome, call 000, coach recovery position + rescue breaths, and instruct any available pre-dosed take-home (intranasal/prefilled IM) naloxone. The clinician's IM naloxone dose is recorded in node 10/12 as the correct emergency pathway, not synthesised.

Clinician-measured vitals (RR 6, SpO2 82%, BP 90/55, HR 55, Temp 35.8), GCS 3, pupillary reactivity, capillary glucose 5.5 mmol/L and tox screen/ECG sealed into nodes 10/11 with telehealth_limits — not exposed in 01. Carer-observable proxies (very slow breathing, cyanosis, pinpoint pupils, unresponsiveness) placed in 01.objective_data_offered as unverified caregiver/video observations.
Candidate codes only (SNOMED/ICD-10-AM/AMT) — all unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; not confirmed against a live terminology server.
Adult patient — no paediatric dosing involved. Community naloxone framed as a pre-dosed device to avoid synthesising a dose not in the source.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
